function site_o_mattic_import_asset($asset) {
    $bytes = base64_decode($asset['base64'], true);
    if (false === $bytes) {
        throw new Exception('Could not decode asset: ' . $asset['filename']);
    }

    $upload = wp_upload_bits($asset['filename'], null, $bytes);
    if (!empty($upload['error'])) {
        throw new Exception($upload['error']);
    }

    $attachment_id = wp_insert_attachment([
        'post_mime_type' => $asset['mimeType'],
        'post_title' => $asset['title'],
        'post_content' => '',
        'post_excerpt' => $asset['alt'],
        'post_status' => 'inherit',
    ], $upload['file']);

    if (is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
        throw new Exception($attachment_id->get_error_message());
    }

    update_post_meta($attachment_id, '_wp_attachment_image_alt', $asset['alt']);
    $metadata = wp_generate_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $upload['file']);
    if (!is_wp_error($metadata) && !empty($metadata)) {
        wp_update_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $metadata);
    }

    return $attachment_id;
}

.som-service-quote-band{
  border-bottom:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #17351f 10%, transparent);
  border-radius:var(--wp--custom--som--radius--card);
  box-shadow:var(--wp--preset--shadow--card);
}
.som-side-rail-quote,
.som-workshop-quote,
.som-detail-quote,
.som-service-quote{
  margin:0;
  max-width:820px;
}
.wp-block-table table{
  border-collapse:collapse;
  width:100%;
}
.wp-block-table caption{
  color:#4f5d50;
  caption-side:top;
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--accent);
  font-size:.78rem;
  font-weight:760;
  letter-spacing:0;
  padding:0 0 .55rem;
  text-align:left;
  text-transform:uppercase;
}
.wp-block-table :where(th,td){
  border-bottom:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #17351f 14%, transparent);
  padding:.9rem 1rem;
  text-align:left;
  vertical-align:top;
}
.wp-block-table thead{
  background:color-mix(in srgb, #f2b84b 20%, #ffffff);
}

.wp-block-quote,
.wp-block-pullquote{
  border-color:#f2b84b;
  color:#17351f;
}
@media (max-width:700px){
  .wp-block-button__link{
    box-sizing:border-box;
    max-width:100%;
  }

  .wp-block-columns{
    gap:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);
  }
  .wp-site-blocks :where(h1,h2){
    hyphens:manual;
    overflow-wrap:break-word;
  }
}
.wp-block-cover .wp-block-cover__inner-container{
  position:relative;
  z-index:1;
}
.wp-block-site-logo img{
  height:auto;
  max-width:min(230px, 62vw);
}
.som-risk-hero .wp-block-cover__inner-container{
  width:min(1180px,100%);
}
.som-risk-hero .wp-block-cover__image-background{
  object-position:52% 50%;
}
.som-risk-panel,
.som-risk-area-note,
.som-warning-row,
.som-plan-step,
.som-risk-band .som-proof-card{
  box-shadow:var(--wp--custom--som--shadow--card);
}
.som-risk-panel,
.som-risk-area-note{
  border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #17351f 10%, transparent);
}
.som-risk-checklist li + li{
  margin-top:8px;
}
.som-warning-row{
  border-left:6px solid #f2b84b;
}
.som-warning-number{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  width:56px;
  height:56px;
  box-sizing:border-box;
  border-radius:999px;
  margin:0!important;
  padding:0!important;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.som-plan-step{
  min-height:100%;
}
@media (max-width:700px){
  .som-risk-hero{
    min-height:760px!important;
    padding-top:42px!important;
    padding-bottom:42px!important;
  }
  .som-risk-hero .wp-block-columns{
    gap:18px!important;
  }
  .som-risk-hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(34px, 10vw, 44px)!important;
    line-height:1.04!important;
    margin-top:8px!important;
    margin-bottom:12px!important;
  }
  .som-risk-copy > p{
    font-size:16px!important;
    line-height:1.48!important;
  }
  .som-risk-panel{
    padding:20px!important;
  }
  .som-risk-hero .wp-block-buttons{
    gap:10px!important;
  }
  .som-risk-hero .wp-block-button__link{
    padding-top:12px!important;
    padding-bottom:12px!important;
  }
}
@media (max-width:700px){
  .wp-site-blocks :where(.som-proof-card,.som-route-proof-card){
    grid-template-rows:auto auto;
    row-gap:14px;
  }

  .wp-block-navigation__responsive-container-open{
    min-width:44px;
    min-height:44px;
  }
}';
if (function_exists('wp_update_custom_css_post')) {
    wp_update_custom_css_post($custom_css, [
        'stylesheet' => get_stylesheet(),
    ]);
}

if (class_exists('WP_Theme_JSON_Resolver')) {
    WP_Theme_JSON_Resolver::clean_cached_data();
}
if (function_exists('wp_clean_theme_json_cache')) {
    wp_clean_theme_json_cache();
}

flush_rewrite_rules();
